arts.ttl: Jason Knight details key factor Bristol City squad is missing ahead of Plymouth Argyle clash
arts.sum: Although Bristol City flexed their attacking muscles earlier in the season as they put four goals past Millwall at Ashton Gate and three past Preston at Deepdale, in their two games following the November international break they have looked toothless in the final third of the pitch despite creating several good scoring opportunities. Bristol City captain Jason Knight has challenged his teammates to find their "ruthless edge" in the final third following the Robins' disappointing defeat to Watford at Vicarage Road.
